jsonLd.title: Noise is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Noise! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Noise:
Noise is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Noise!
